title: TEST ARTICLE — Sandbox Only
excerpt: This is a sandbox test article. It will not appear on the live blog.
tweet1: 1/ Most traders fail not because their strategy is wrong — but because it was never theirs to begin with.
tweet2: 2/ Put a sprinter in a marathon and they burn out by mile 3. Put a marathon runner in a 100m sprint and they're left behind before they've warmed up. Trading works the same way.
tweet3: 3/ If you're wired for patience — comfortable holding positions for days — day trading will destroy your composure. Strategy-personality alignment isn't a preference. It's a requirement.
tweet4: 4/ Once you know your environment the framework is simple. Wait for the session open. One momentum candle breaks structure. Price pulls back and sweeps liquidity. Stop order placed. Market tags you in.
tweet5: 5/ The biggest trap in retail trading is complexity. One candle. One sweep. One entry. That is the entire framework.
tweet6: 6/ Full breakdown of this system: fortitudefx.com More on the system: fortitudefx.com Free community: discord.com/invite/fWAPJdR8TR
